name: Animal Obby
author: Poki
description: Animal Obby is an exciting obstacle course game where you switch between five animals (gecko, monkey, kangaroo, turkey, and elephant) to complete challenging levels. Each animal has special abilities to help you overcome obstacles, and if a level gets too tough, power-ups like flight can give you a boost! How do I play Animal Obby? Use the mouse to click on different buttons, powerups, and customization options! Move: WASD or Arrow Keys; Jump: Spacebar; Switch Animal: 1, 2, 3, 4, and 5; Mobile Controls: Use the left joystick to move, right joystick to rotate the camera, and the jump button to jump. Who created Animal Obby? Animal Obby is created by Kimchi Soup Studios, a team passionate about crafting fun, creative multiplayer games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Animal Obby for free? You can play Animal Obby for free on Poki. Can I play Animal Obby on mobile devices and desktop? Animal Obby can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Animal Obby with my friend? Yes! Animal Obby is a multiplayer game so you can create online lobbies and play with your friends!
